versions.version_description: More accurate chords in my opinion.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Making Love Out Of Nothing At All

content:
Song: All Out Of Love
Artist: Air Supply
by Ronnie86

[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]F/A[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
I'm lying alone with my head on the phone,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
thinking of you 'til it hurts[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G/B[/ch]
I know you hurt too, but what else can we do,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
tormented and torn apart.[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I wish I could carry your smile in my heart,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
For times when my life seems so low.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G/B[/ch]
It would make me believe what tomorrow could bring,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
When today doesn't really know, doesn't really know.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm all out of love, I'm so lost without you,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I know you were right, believing for so long.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm all out of love, what am I without you,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I can't be too late to say that I was so wrong.[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
I want you to come back and carry me home,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
Away from these long, lonely nights.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm reaching for you. Are you feeling it too?[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Does the feeling seem oh, so right?[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And what would you say if I called on you now,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
And said that I can't hold on?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]G/B[/ch]
There's no easy way, it gets harder each day,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Please love me or I'll be gone.  I'll be gone.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm all out of love, I'm so lost without you,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
I know you were right, believing for so long.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm all out of love, what am I without you,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I can't be too late to say that I was so wrong.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
Oooo....What are you thinking of[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
What are you thinking of[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]
What are you thinking of[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
What are you thinking of[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G/B[/ch]
I'm all out of love, I'm so lost without you,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F/A[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
